description: The WorldCloseAction component is used to handle the leaving of a world after the user confirms leaving. This component only works on user space.

fields.Action: The kind of action this Button Events recieving Component is doing to a world.
fields.WaitingConfirm: Whether the game is waiting on confirmation via double click, which is 2 clicks within a 2 second time frame.
fields.OnClosed: What Action Sync delegate to call when the world finishes closing.
